case_title: MARTINEZ, ALBERT et al VS DENHAM, JOE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,867.97 FILED BY MARTINEZ, ALBERT MARTINEZ, GLADYS AS TO DEFENDANT DENHAM, JOE DENHAM, MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DENHAM, MARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, ALBERT MARTINEZ, GLADYS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENHAM, JOE DENHAM, MARY $1,867.97 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,915.97, DEFENDANT JOE DENHAM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO JOE AND MARY DENHAM RETURNED - NOT AT THIS ADDRESS;
